Usage:
  circleci context secret [command]

Available Commands:
  delete      Delete an environment variable from a context
  list        List environment variables in a context
  set         Set an environment variable in a context

Global Flags:
  -c, --config string   path to config file (default: ~/.config/circleci/config.yml)
      --debug           enable debug logging
  -q, --quiet           suppress informational output; data on stdout is unaffected

Use "circleci context secret [command] --help" for more information about a command.
